name: my-remote
description: Mac remote control server with Cloudflare Access

scripts.dev: CF_ACCESS_ENABLED=false APP_PASSWORD= USE_HTTPS=false PORT=3000 node server.js
scripts.generate-certs: mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey ec -pkeyopt ec_paramgen_curve:prime256v1 -nodes -keyout certs/key.pem -out certs/cert.pem -days 365 -subj '/CN=localhost'
